findings.message: Execution/refactor guidance only mentions naming-workbench handling for ASSESSMENT-04 and ASSESSMENT-05, but the plan's own subdirectory rule also requires ASSESSMENT-13 scanning.
Validation contract still says 'ASSESSMENT-04 directory' in the scenario list.
non-existent strategyRoot -> empty array is underspecified against the businesses override option.
Scout note says PWRB 'may need naming-shortlist pattern' but that pattern is already formalized in the mapping table.
